docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-22-2025 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JAN-28-2026 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF SIHARACH KAEWNIM IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSH M. FREDRICKS; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY KAEWNIM, SIHARACH AS TO DEFENDANT HIGER, CECAR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-22-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.
ORDER TO DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. PLAINTIFF SIHARACH KAEWNIM IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CECAR HIGER IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: ; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. BAILIFF: DEPUTY WILSON. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
